name: ezeldsolutions.com
message: In late 2017, we established EZ ELD Solutions. The initial mission of our company was to be provide the Indian Community across the country, with a reliable, simple, and driver-friend solution that complied with the ELD Mandate. We as a company had high expectations for our product, and we were overwhelmed with response received from the trucking industry.  Although we are a relatively new company, we have no shortage of ambition or enthusiasm. At our core we are a trucking company, but our recent introduction to the tech sector, has allowed us to identify several other sectors within the industry that are in need of dire improvement. We have begun developing new products that we believe will keep us at the forefront of a rapidly changing world.
